The Bahnsen Group Launches the TBG Dividend Focus ETF (NYSE: TBG)

holdings.infoBox: TBG is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 6.12%, Blackstone at 4.50%, Simon Property Group at 4.30%, Merck & Co. at 3.82%, and The Procter & Gamble Company at 3.75%.

overview.description: The TBG Dividend Focus ETF (TBG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying US companies selected using fundamental analysis. The fund seeks to provide income and long-term capital appreciation TBG was launched on Nov 6, 2023 and is issued by Madison Avenue.
